LAW AND MOTION, 301, MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD & 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION & FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS, SUBMITTED ON DEC-23-2003 BY JAMES L. WARREN. MR. FREDERICKS REPRESENTS THAT OPPOSING COUNSEL WAS NOTIFIED OF HIS APPEARANCE TODAY. MR. FREDERICKS ADDRESSES THE TENTATIVE RULING AS TO MOTION TO STRIKE THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT DALE FREDERICKS' MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD & 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION AND FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS: MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS GRANTED BY STIPULATION; MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS RE: ALL CAUSES OF ACTION IS DENIED. HOWEVER, THE COURT TOOK UNDER SUBMISSION DEFENDANT DALE FREDERICKS' MOTION TO STRIKE AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION. FORM OF ORDER IS TO BE SUBMITTED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
